parallelizationPlan.decisionEscalationRule: children stop and escalate product/architecture ambiguity to parent
parallelizationPlan.timeoutPolicy: timed-out child gate fails; partial edits are untrusted until reviewed/completed by approved route or takeover exception
parallelizationPlan.validationPolicy: child-local validation plus parent global validation required
parallelizationPlan.sequentialFlowRule: sequential UX/state flows are serialized unless slices are independent surfaces
